complaint: When I start the truck cold there's a horrible screeching squeal under the hood, it shrieks for a minute then quiets down, I'm worried the engine is tearing itself apart.
observations: High-pitched squeal on cold start, fades as engine warms
Serpentine belt glazed with cracks on ribbed side
Belt squeal stops momentarily when accessory load applied; tensioner arm springs back slowly
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'serpentine belt and tensioner'.
